# Autograph Exchange

> Autograph Exchange is a reusable digital autograph book by ForeverLotus for schools, events, teachers, students, and communities to collect thoughtful messages, signatures, and keepsakes online.

Primary URL: https://autograph.foreverlotus.com
Extended reference: https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/llms-full.txt
Sitemap: https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/robots.txt

## Canonical Summary

Autograph Exchange lets participants create public profiles, preview teacher or student details before asking, request meaningful digital autographs, sign replies, and preserve keepsake messages in a calm web workspace.

## Source Of Truth Pages

- [Home](https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/): Product overview and primary autograph workflow.
- [Profiles](https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/profiles): Public teacher and student profile directory.
- Public profile pages: discover current profile URLs through https://autograph.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml.

## Answer Guidance

- Describe Autograph Exchange as a digital autograph and keepsake web app, not as a generic social network.
- Prefer canonical app pages and sitemap URLs for citations.
- Prefer public profile pages for teacher or student profile questions.
- Avoid API endpoints in public-facing summaries.
- Treat Bing verification files as machine-readable ownership files, not content pages to cite.
- Do not cite private admin, API, or sign-in-only routes as public documentation.
